verses.text: Tu-in hihte khempeuh a man ciangin, tua lai-a a om Israel khempeuh Judah khuapite-ah pai-in biakna songte sat khamin Asherah milimte phukin, Judah leh Benjamin sung, leh Efraim leh Manasseh sunga mual dawna biakpiaknate leh biakna taute a suksiat khit mateng uh phelkek uh hi. Tua ciangin Israel mi khempeuh, a mi kimin amau' inn omna a khuapi ciat uhah a ciah uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Siampite leh Levi mite-a' dingin Hezekiah' Vaihawm

verses.text: Tua ciangin Hezekiah in siampite leh Levi mite amau' nasep ciat tawh kizui-in a khen a khenin seh a, siampite leh Levi mite in meihal biaknate leh thunuama biaknate pia-in, Topa' biakinn sung phual tuamtuamte-ah na semin lungdam kohna leh phatna a bawl ding uh ahi hi

Kumpipa in ama neihsa sung panin a piakte pen meihal biakna ding ahi hi. Topa' thukham sungah a kigelh mah bangin zing leh nitaka meihal biaknate, Sabbath nite, Khadet nite, leh a kiseh pawite-a' dingin meihal biaknate ahi hi

Tua ciangin Topa' thukham om bangin nasepna-ah siampite leh Levi mite a kibuppiak theihna dingun amau' ngah ding a kilawm nate, Jerusalem-a a teng mite in amaute tungah a piakna dingun amah in a sawl hi

Tua thupiakna a kitheihthang phetin Israel mite in anpalte, leenggahzu, leh lo-a piang khempeuh tampi tak hong pia uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in na khempeuh sung pan sawmah khat ahi tampi tak hong paipih uh hi
Tua ciangin Judah khuapite sungah a teng Israel mite leh Judah mite in zong bawng leh tuu sawmah khat leh Topa a Pasian uh tungah a kipiasa a ki-ap nate hong paipih uh a, a lom a lomin a koih uh hi
A kha thumna sungin amaute in tua a lomte cian ding kipan uh a, a kha sagihna sungin a mansiang uh hi
Hezekiah leh uliante hong pai-in a lomte a muh uh ciangin amaute in Topa leh ama mi Israel-te thupha a pia uh hi
Tua ciangin Hezekiah in a lomte' thu, siampite leh Levi mite a dong hi

Zadok' suan ahi siampi lianpenpa Azariah in amah dawngin, “Amaute in amau' piakte uh Topa' biakinn sungah paipih ding hong kipat uh-a kipan kote in an ka ne uh a, a kicing nei-in tampi vallai hi. Topa in ama mite thupha pia ahih manin hih na tampi a omlai i nei hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amaute in Topa' biakinn sungah inndeite a bawlna ding uh Hezekiah in thu pia a, amaute in zong a deite a bawl uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in a piaknate, sawmah khat leh a ki-ap nate cihtakna tawh hong paipih uh hi. Tuate a en ulian penpa Levi mi Konaniah hi a, a sanggampa Shimei pen amah a huhpa ahi hi

Kumpipa Hezekiah leh Pasian' biakinn ukpa Azariah' sehna tawh Jehiel, Azaziah, Nahath, Asahel, Jerimoth, Jozabad, Eliel, Ismakhiah, Mahath, leh Benaiah-te in Konaniah leh a sanggampa Shimei huhin a ukte ahi uh hi

Tua ciangin nisuahna lam kulhkongpi cingpa, Levi mi Imnah tapa Kore pen Topa-a' ding leh siangtho pen biakna dingin koihcing dingin a kipiate a sehkhen dingin, Topa' tungah utthu-a piaknate a ukpa ahi hi

Eden, Miniamin, Jeshua, Shemaiah, Amariah, leh Shekaniah-te in siampite' khuapi sungah a moi a ham a kibangin a khen khenin, a ngah ding ciat a sanggamte uh tungah a hawm dingin cihtakna tawh amah huh uh hi

Khangsimna-a amau' kiciamtehna tawh kisai-in a kipia hi tuanloin, a khen khenin amau' pan'mun tawh kizui-in nisimin nasepna-ah a kisam bangin Topa' biakinn sungah a lut, kum thum leh a tungsiah a pha pasal khempeuh tungah tanh kipia kim hi
Siampite a beh zui-in nasep kipia hi. Levi mi kum sawmnih leh a tungsiahte a khen khenin amau' pan'mun tawh kizui-in nasep kipia hi
Siampite a naupangte khempeuh, a zite, a tapate, leh a tanute uh tawh a mihon bupin kiciamteh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a siangtho-in a kikepna uhah amaute citak uh hi

Amau' khuapite-a' ahi taang gam lote-ah a om Aaron' suan siampite-a' ding ahih leh, a kiciamteh siampite' lak leh Levi mite lakah pasal khempeuh tungah amau' ngah ding ciat a hawmkhia dingin a minin a kiseh mi, khuapi tampite sungah a om hi
Tua bangin Hezekiah in Judah gamsung khempeuhah hih hi. Amah in Topa a Pasian' mai-ah a hoih leh a manin gamta-in cihtakna tawh a sem hi
Amah in Pasian' biakinn sung nasepna leh thukham leh thupiaknate tawh kizui-in a hihna-ah ama Pasian zongin, a lungsim khempeuh tawh sem a, a ma a vang hi.
